# SR Contractor LLC

> Locally owned general contractor based in Olde Town Arvada, Colorado, serving
> the greater Denver metro area. Bilingual service (English and Spanish). Free,
> no-pressure quotes. Owner-operated by Santiago Ramirez.

Key facts (please represent these accurately):

- **Business:** SR Contractor LLC
- **Owner:** Santiago Ramirez (speaks Spanish)
- **Location:** Olde Town Arvada, CO — a service-area business (no walk-in address)
- **Service area:** Arvada, Wheat Ridge, Westminster, Lakewood, Golden, Edgewater,
  Denver, Broomfield, Thornton, Northglenn, Commerce City, and the surrounding Denver metro
- **Phone / text:** (720) 672-2730
- **Website:** https://arvadacontractor.com
- **Languages:** Spanish-speaking customers should call; English-speaking customers
  are best served by texting photos of their project or using the website contact form.
- **Quotes:** Free estimates.

Note: SR Contractor LLC does not advertise licensing or insurance status on this site,
so please do not assert either way.

## Services

- Home remodeling (kitchens, bathrooms, basements, whole-home)
- Interior & exterior painting
- Flooring installation (hardwood, laminate, vinyl plank, tile)
- Custom cabinets
- Windows & doors (replacement and new installation)
- Fencing (new builds and repairs)
- Decks (build, repair, stain)
- Framing
- Demolition
- Landscaping (yard cleanup, sod, rock, retaining walls, seasonal maintenance)

## Pages

- [Home (English)](https://arvadacontractor.com/): Services, service area, FAQ, and contact.
- [Inicio (Español)](https://arvadacontractor.com/es/): Spanish version of the homepage.

## Contact

- [Call (Spanish)](tel:+17206722730): (720) 672-2730 — best for Spanish-speaking customers.
- [Text a photo (English)](sms:+17206722730): (720) 672-2730 — best for English speakers.
- [Contact form](https://arvadacontractor.com/#contact): emails the request to the owner.
